meta.purpose: Examples that show judgment structure rather than scripts.
meta.load_condition: Load when examples, transformation patterns, or before/after critique are needed.

cases.brief: A card expand animation animates width instead of transform: scaleX.
cases.bad_pattern: Animating width triggers layout recalculation on every frame, affecting sibling elements, causing visible jank at 15-20fps.
cases.master_pattern: Use transform: scaleX for the visual scaling, set the final width via CSS class after the animation completes, and apply overflow: hidden to the container.

cases.brief: Scroll-linked animation reads offsetTop inside a scroll handler.
cases.bad_pattern: Reading offsetTop forces synchronous layout on every scroll event, blocking the main thread and creating visible scroll lag.
cases.master_pattern: Cache layout values on resize and scroll with requestAnimationFrame batching. Use IntersectionObserver for visibility triggers instead of manual offset calculations.
